description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a dense ring of mature trees, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The building features a light blue exterior with a flat, white roof and several visible windows and doors, some of which are accented with awnings. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a garage, and the main entrance is clearly defined. The property is enclosed by the trees, which act as a natural barrier and provide shade. The overall structure is rectangular, with a modest footprint and a simple, modern design. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, contributing to the balanced appearance of the bungalow.
description: A light blue, single-story bungalow with a flat white roof, surrounded by dense trees and featuring a driveway and garage. The structure is modern, rectangular, and has a symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and the dense tree enclosure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow and the continuous tree barrier.
description_view_2: Rear view with trees closely hugging the back of the bungalow and fewer visible architectural details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side windows, and the tree enclosure.
